questions.question: Which layer of the OSI model is responsible for logical addressing and routing?
questions.explanation: The Network layer (Layer 3) handles logical addressing (IP addresses) and routing packets between different networks.

questions.question: What does CPU stand for?
questions.explanation: CPU stands for Central Processing Unit — the primary component of a computer that executes instructions.

questions.question: Which data structure uses LIFO ordering?
questions.explanation: A Stack uses Last In First Out (LIFO) — the last element pushed is the first to be popped.

questions.question: What is the time complexity of binary search?
questions.explanation: Binary search halves the search space on each step, giving O(log n) time complexity.

questions.question: Which HTTP method is idempotent and used to retrieve a resource?
In Vue 3, which function is used to declare reactive state?
questions.explanation: ref() wraps a value in a reactive reference. computed() derives state, reactive() wraps objects, and data() is Vue 2 Options API.

questions.question: Which sorting algorithm has the best average-case time complexity?
questions.explanation: Merge Sort has O(n log n) average-case complexity, better than Bubble Sort, Insertion Sort, and Selection Sort which are all O(n²).

questions.question: What is the purpose of a foreign key in a relational database?
options: To index a column for fast lookup

questions.question: Which CSS property controls the space inside an element's border?
questions.explanation: padding controls the space between an element's content and its border. margin controls the space outside the border.
